title: Pepopack
description: This pack adds PePe frogs to the GUI and makes it a little brighter, and also changes some other colors to pistachio
body:
>### Rus:
 >> Данный пак создан по мотивам лягушки Пепе и призван для разнообразия обычного GUI Майнкрафта

---

>### Eng
 >> This pack was created based on Pepe the frog and is designed to diversify the usual Minecraft GUI
